master.prompt: Create an image for Tellery, a premium interactive storytelling app. The image belongs to the story “O Relógio Parado”, an elegant Brazilian-inspired literary mystery set inside Relojoaria O Pêndulo, a refined antique watchmaker’s shop, on a quiet Monday morning after a rare pocket watch has disappeared from a locked display case. Art direction: premium cinematic editorial illustration, semi-realistic digital painting, refined adult mystery, intimate literary atmosphere, sophisticated but calm, inquisitive rather than frightening, not scary. The visual tone should feel like an interactive short story or a prestige streaming mystery, not like a traditional game. Setting identity: Relojoaria O Pêndulo is an elegant old watchmaker’s shop with dark mahogany wood, deep moss-green walls, aged brass and bronze details, glass display cases, small clocks and watch faces, tiny precision tools, magnifying loupes, green felt lining, and a sophisticated Brazilian urban antiquary mood. Color palette: deep moss green #2B3A2E, dark forest #1E2A22, aged brass #B08A3E, warm gold #C49A4A, mahogany brown #3E2418, dark polished wood #2A1810, pearl cream #F2EBDC, bronze #7A5A2A, slate gray shadows #3A3A3D, soft amber lamp light #C68A3E. Lighting: warm amber interior lamps, soft directional highlights from a single desk lamp, deep but elegant green and brown shadows, subtle golden reflections on glass and polished brass, gentle depth falloff. Style: refined, polished, modern, premium, adult, literary, cinematic, semi-realistic, soft depth of field, subtle film grain, elegant composition, believable materials, emotionally grounded realism. Recurring motifs: watch dials, clock hands, gears, pocket watch cases, velvet jewelry boxes, small brass keys, precision tools, magnifying loupes, handwritten ledger pages. Avoid horror, gore, blood, weapons, police crime-scene aesthetics, skulls, monsters, childish illustration, cartoon style, anime, fantasy RPG visuals, game UI, neon cyberpunk, text overlays, logos, and watermarks.

cover.prompt: Create a wide cinematic cover image for the interactive mystery story “O Relógio Parado”. Show the interior of Relojoaria O Pêndulo, a refined antique watchmaker’s shop, early on a quiet Monday morning. The main focus is the central display case at the back of the shop: a tall glass-and-mahogany vitrine with a dark velvet jewelry box sitting open and empty in its center, where a precious antique pocket watch called the Cronos should be resting. The empty velvet box is the central mystery object and should clearly read as the place where something valuable is missing. Around the shop: dark moss-green walls, polished mahogany furniture, small antique clocks on shelves, a tidy workbench with tiny precision tools and magnifying loupes, and a single warm desk lamp casting soft amber light. A discreet brass sign on the wall may read “O Pêndulo” only if it renders cleanly and naturally. Composition: wide horizontal hero-card framing for a mobile storytelling app. Place the display case slightly right of center. Leave darker atmospheric negative space on the left side for future app title and CTA overlay, but do not render any text overlay. Use the depth of the shop behind the case to create atmosphere, with softly blurred clock faces and shelves. No people in the foreground. Mood: refined, calm, inquisitive, literary, quietly mysterious, inviting.

thumbnail.prompt: Create a cinematic close-up thumbnail for the interactive mystery story “O Relógio Parado”. Show a dark velvet jewelry box sitting open and empty on a polished mahogany surface inside an antique watchmaker’s shop. The velvet interior clearly shows the soft rounded imprint where a gold pocket watch once rested, making the absence the focal point. Around it: soft reflections of brass tools, the edge of a glass display case, and warm amber bokeh from a desk lamp. Composition: square close-up still life, the empty velvet box dominates the frame, strong focal hierarchy, shallow depth of field, high contrast between the soft velvet interior and the dark polished wood. The empty box should remain instantly readable as “something valuable is missing” even at small mobile thumbnail size. Mood: refined, quiet, suspicious, elegant, literary.

vitrine.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Vitrine central” inside Relojoaria O Pêndulo. Show the main display case: a tall elegant cabinet of dark mahogany wood and thick glass, standing at the back of the shop. In the center of the case, a dark velvet jewelry box sits open and empty, where the antique gold pocket watch called Cronos should be. Near the lock of the vitrine, a fresh scratch catches the light, suggesting the glass was opened in haste. On top of a cloth just beside the case lies a small antique brass key, out of its usual place. Around it: moss-green walls, brass details, small antique clocks and watch faces on the surrounding shelves, and warm amber light from a nearby lamp. Composition: the display case is the clear focal point, centered slightly off-axis, with enough surrounding shop context to establish the location. Mood: quiet, suspicious, refined, investigative. Important visual clues: empty velvet box in the vitrine, fresh scratch on the lock, misplaced brass key, glass and mahogany display case, surrounding antique clocks.

bancada.prompt: Create a cinematic location image for “Bancada de trabalho” inside Relojoaria O Pêndulo. Show the watchmaker’s workbench along the side wall: a solid wooden table covered with tiny precision tools, magnifying loupes, small tweezers, watch dials, parts trays, and a soft green felt mat. On the bench lies an open worn visitor’s ledger with recent pen notes, and at the corner a metal waste bin hints at a crumpled piece of paper inside. A single warm desk lamp lights the workspace, while the rest of the shop fades softly into green and brown shadows. Composition: medium-wide horizontal shot with the workbench clearly visible, the open ledger and the waste bin noticeable enough to function as clues, but not overly dramatic. Mood: orderly, focused, refined, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: precision tools, open ledger, waste bin with crumpled paper, desk lamp, green felt mat, surrounding watch parts.

estojo_vazio.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Estojo do Cronos”, the central clue in the mystery. Show a dark velvet jewelry box sitting open on a polished mahogany surface inside the display case. The velvet interior is shaped to hold a round pocket watch, and the soft rounded imprint of the missing Cronos is still visible in the lining, making the absence unmistakable. The box looks elegant, undamaged, and carefully handled, with no sign of violence or forced opening. Around it, soft reflections of brass tools and warm amber light appear blurred in the background. Composition: close-up still life, the open empty velvet box dominates the frame, with velvet texture and mahogany grain clearly visible. Mood: intimate, suspicious, elegant, important, quiet absence.

chave_reserva.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Chave reserva da vitrine”. Show a small antique brass key resting on a soft cloth just beside the glass display case inside Relojoaria O Pêndulo. The key looks old, finely crafted, and clearly out of its usual place on the workbench. Near the lock of the vitrine, a fresh scratch in the brass catches the warm light, suggesting the key was used in haste. Composition: square close-up still life, the small brass key is the clear focal point, with the edge of the glass case, the scratch on the lock, and warm amber reflections around it. Mood: ordinary but important, investigative, refined, quietly suspicious. Important visual clues: small antique key, soft cloth, scratch on the lock, glass case edge.

agenda_hugo.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Agenda de visitantes” from the Bancada location. Show a worn-cover notebook lying open on the watchmaker’s workbench, with recent handwritten entries in dark pen. The pages list names, times, and short notes about who entered and left the shop, suggesting a careful Sunday afternoon record. Tiny precision tools, a magnifying loupe, and the edge of a green felt mat appear softly blurred around it. A single warm desk lamp lights the page, leaving the rest of the bench in soft shadow. Composition: square close-up still life, the open ledger is the main focus, with elegant paper texture and legible handwriting detail. Mood: orderly, calm, investigative, refined. Important visual clues: open ledger, handwritten names and times, pen, workbench context.

recibo_penhor.prompt: Create a close-up object image for “Recibo amassado” found in the waste bin at the workbench. Show a crumpled piece of paper partially smoothed on the wooden surface, with the faded stamp of a pawnshop partially visible at the top. The date and a few letters are readable, but the name of the person who pawned the item is smudged or torn, leaving the document ambiguous but suggestive. The paper looks ordinary, hastily discarded, and slightly suspicious. Warm amber light falls across the page, while the edge of the metal waste bin and blurred watchmaker tools appear around it. Composition: square close-up still life, the crumpled receipt is the clear focal point, with realistic paper texture and ambiguous handwritten or stamped detail. Mood: quiet, suspicious, ordinary, investigative. Important visual clues: crumpled paper, pawnshop stamp, smudged name, date, waste bin edge.

hugo.prompt: Create a character portrait for Hugo, owner of Relojoaria O Pêndulo. Hugo is a Brazilian adult man in his late 50s or early 60s. He is methodical, observant, proud of his craft, and visibly shaken after discovering that the Cronos has vanished. He wants to recover the watch without turning the case into a police scandal. Appearance: refined veteran watchmaker, calm intelligent eyes, neat gray hair, small reading glasses or a magnifying loupe resting on his forehead, a dark vest or tailored shirt with rolled sleeves, perhaps a thin gold pocket-watch chain across the chest. His expression is measured, serious, alert, and quietly hurt. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the watchmaker’s shop softly blurred behind him, with green walls, brass details, and amber light on one side of his face. He should look human, believable, emotionally grounded, and not villainous. Mood: restrained authority, professional pride, quiet worry, careful observation.

bia.prompt: Create a character portrait for Bia, the young apprentice at Relojoaria O Pêndulo. Bia is a Brazilian young adult woman in her early 20s. She is dedicated, sensitive, and visibly nervous after the disappearance of the Cronos, clearly afraid of being blamed. She is the true culprit but not a villain: she acted out of desperation, not greed. Appearance: young apprentice, simple practical clothing, a dark apron or work shirt, hair tied back but slightly loose after a long day, perhaps a thin cord necklace. Her hands may fidget near a small tool or the edge of her apron. Her expression is anxious, earnest, overwhelmed, and trying hard to appear calm. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the watchmaker’s workbench softly blurred behind her, with warm amber light, green shadows, and tiny tools in the background. She should look human, vulnerable, and morally complex rather than obviously guilty. Mood: nervous innocence, vulnerability, hidden guilt, relatable humanity.

theo.prompt: Create a character portrait for Theo, a customer and experienced watch collector. Theo is a Brazilian adult man in his late 40s or early 50s. He is calm, articulate, and slightly self-assured. He came to the shop on Sunday afternoon to evaluate the Cronos and made a low offer that Hugo refused. He is innocent of the theft, but he knows he is the obvious suspect and uses openness as a shield. Appearance: refined adult collector, tasteful outfit, an elegant coat or tailored jacket, a subtle vintage watch on the wrist, well-groomed hair, confident posture. His expression is composed, slightly raised chin, guarded but cooperative eyes, a faint polite smile. Composition: vertical bust or upper-body portrait, the watchmaker’s shop softly blurred behind him, with green walls, amber lights, and perhaps the edge of a display case. He should look sophisticated, believable, and socially polished rather than threatening. Mood: confident elegance, social control, restrained defensiveness, calm honesty.

full_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the full truth ending of “O Relógio Parado”. Show the central display case of Relojoaria O Pêndulo after the mystery is resolved. The dark velvet jewelry box sits open on the polished mahogany surface, and the antique gold pocket watch called Cronos is gently returning to its place, with its chain coiled beside it, symbolizing that the truth was recovered. Nearby, on a soft cloth, rests the small brass reserve key that was used to open the case, now calmly returned. The workbench, the visitor’s ledger, and the crumpled pawnshop receipt are softly visible in the background, no longer threatening. The atmosphere feels calmer, warmer, and more reflective, with amber light and soft green shadows. Composition: wide horizontal image, no people, focus on the returning pocket watch and the returned key as symbols of resolution. Mood: reflective, resolved, bittersweet, elegant, literary.

partial_truth.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the partial truth ending of “O Relógio Parado”. Show the central display case of Relojoaria O Pêndulo with the dark velvet jewelry box still open and empty, where the Cronos is still missing. The small brass reserve key lies on the cloth nearby, suggesting that part of the truth was uncovered, but the pocket watch itself remains absent from the frame, hidden in shadow or simply out of sight. The workbench, the open ledger, and the crumpled pawnshop receipt appear softly blurred at the edges of the image, surrounded by deeper shadows and uncertainty. The shop remains warm and elegant, but the borders of the image are darker and less resolved. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the empty velvet box and the returned key, with deeper shadows around the frame. No characters. Mood: ambiguous, elegant, unresolved, quiet discomfort.

wrong_accusation.prompt: Create a cinematic ending image for the wrong accusation ending of “O Relógio Parado”. Show the interior of Relojoaria O Pêndulo after closing time, with the central display case still containing the open and empty velvet jewelry box. The Cronos is still missing and the truth has not been found. Small antique clocks on the surrounding shelves continue to mark the time, indifferent to what was lost, and soft golden reflections linger on the glass. The lighting is warm but heavier with shadows, and the atmosphere suggests that the real culprit walked away unnoticed. The scene should feel quietly regretful and unresolved, without becoming scary. Composition: wide horizontal image, focus on the empty velvet box slightly off-center inside the case, surrounded by ticking clocks and soft shadows, no characters. Mood: unresolved, quiet, regretful, elegant, literary.
